name: Panchy Briefs
description:
⚠ NETORI/CHEATING WARNING!

You wanted to visit your friend Bulma today looking forward to hit on her like usually, but turns out she's literally at another planet right now, dealing with some Fridger guy. But don't worry, because her mom is still here to keep you entertained enough. Who needs a girl when you can have her mom?

This has been in my request list for a LOOONG time already. To the dude who asked for her, sorry for taking so long, I just couldn't find proper art for her thumbnail. Which leads me to the next thing:

If you didn't realize, this image is AI generated, yes, but it's also 'made' by me. That's it, since I sometimes struggle a lot to find art of some characters, I managed to get my hands on one of these to make my own. I know it's not perfect and looks a bit weird, but I'm still getting used to how this thing works, and it looks pretty decent to me. So yeah, for now, expect more characters from 'peak' coming from me.

By the way, no, I will never be taking art generation requests.

[Art based in Natedecock's style]

> CLICK HERE FOR IMAGE GALLERY <
creator: forcedattrition
